summary: Backend Refactoring Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend flows working. Backend monolithic server.py (2078 lines) successfully split into 12 modular files. Admin Panel pin/unpin optimistic update working correctly without DOM detachment.

passed_tests: GET /api/news/feed returns articles with proper structure
GET /api/epaper/2026-03-05 returns dense pages with articles
POST /api/auth/send-otp works for admin number 9876543210 (returns debug OTP 123456)
Admin Panel loads at /admin after login
Admin Panel pin/unpin does NOT cause DOM detachment (optimistic update working)
ePaper page loads with newspaper layout, KAIZER NEWS masthead visible
Home page shows news feed with categories

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successfully splits monolithic server.py into modular route files
All routes properly imported and registered in main server.py (~50 lines)
Database connection and shared config properly centralized in database.py
Admin Panel pin toggle uses optimistic state update (line 285-286) preventing DOM detachment
Scraper correctly handles lazy-loaded images with data-src and data-lazy-src attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (2078 lines) to 12 modular files complete and verified. All API endpoints working: auth, news, epaper, live-tv, shorts, scraper, analytics. Admin Panel pin/unpin uses optimistic state update to prevent DOM detachment issue. ePaper generates dense broadsheet pages with KAIZER NEWS masthead.
